Name: American Samoa 60 Days Entry Permit
                Visiting Country: American Samoa
                Description: United States Tourist visa is required for Indian passport holders. 
Non-immigrant visa's are for person who wish to enter the United States temporarily for Business (visa category B-1) or tourism, pleasure or visiting (visa category B-2) or a combination of both purposes (B-1/B-2).

                Visa Fees: $ 160 USD

                Visa Needed: 1
                Type: Tourist
                Documents Required: Documents Requirements

1). The Applicant should have a passport valid for at least six months from the desired date of entry.
2). One passport-size photograph.
3). Online Visa Application Form, DS-160.
4). Birth certificate and, if applicable, parents' valid visas (for minor's applications).
5). A printout of an Appointment confirmation.
6). If employed, carry a letter from employer detailing your position, salary, how long you have been employed with the company; the period of authorized vacation; and the purpose of your U.S. trip.
i). Income Tax Returns for the last three (3) years.
ii).Itemised Bank statements and other documents to show the assets of the Applicant (if any) is needed.
iii). In the event of having a Sponsor the following documents are required of him/ her:
iv). It is also helpful to carry evidence of how the trip will be financed along with letters of deputation, invitation or sponsorship.
v). An Affidavit of Support (Form I-134) from the Sponsor.
vi). Bank statements.
vii). Copy of employment Letter.
viii). Copies of the Passport (along with the visa pages) of the Relative in the United States.
ix). Documents to show the Sponsor's legal status in the United States.

Note: Visa applicants must qualify on the basis of the applicant's residence and ties abroad, rather than assurances from U.S. family and friends. A letter of invitation or Affidavit of Support is not needed to apply for a nonimmigrant Tourist visa. If you do choose to bring a letter of invitation or Affidavit of Support to your interview, please remember that it is not one of the factors that we use in determining whether to issue or deny a nonimmigrant Tourist visa.

Name: South Africa Short Term Tourist Visa
                Visiting Country: South Africa
                Description: This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities.

SOME IMPORTANT POINTS
Incomplete applications will not be accepted. Please, bear in mind that failing to meet any of the following requirements will also render the application incomplete:

We strongly recommend that you pay careful attention to the Overview, Documents Required and Processing Time sections of your chosen visa category, before proceeding with your application.

Please be aware that all decisions regarding the issuance of, number of entries and duration of a visa are at the sole discretion of the embassy, and it is not guaranteed that the South Africa High Commission; New Delhi / Consulate General; Mumbai will grant your request.

Please be aware that applicants should be aware of the processing time for their chosen category of visa and apply accordingly. Please also note that all processing times are minimum as stated, and in some cases may take longer.

Visa Fee / VFS Logistic Charges can be accepted in Cash/Card.

Documents issued in a Regional language must be officially translated to English.
                Visa Fees: Adult - INR Gratis

Service Fees - INR 2040
                Visa Needed: 1
                Type: Tourist
                Documents Required: 1. Application form must be completed in black ink and block letters, form must be signed by the applicant and signature should match the signature on the passport.

- For Minor applicants - In application form parents need to sign instead of minor applicant.

2. Old and New Passport valid for six months with at least Two unused/blank visa pages.

- Copies of passport bio-data pages (photo page and address/parents page)

3. Two recent photographs - 35mm x 45mm

4. Covering letter signed by the applicant with the purpose of visit, duration, designation, passport details & contact number.

- Letter must have the physical address, as well as contact details of authorized signature’s name, designation and signature (should clearly mention who will bear the expenses of the trip)

- Original covering letter on letter head if self employed.

- In case of sponsor: Proof of sponsorship and a letter from the sponsor, financial documents as well as copy of the sponsor’s photo ID, (e.g. passport, Aadhaar card or driver’s license)

5. Original NOC for leave from company/School/University clearly mentioning the name, passport number of applicant(s) and duration of visit.

- Letter must have the physical address, as well as contact details of authorized signature’s name, designation, and signature.

6. A day-to-day itinerary/travel plan covering your stay in South Africa.

7. Three months’ salary slip and last 3 years IT returns.

8. Vaccination certificate, (yellow fever) If applicant will travel through or stay in yellow fever belt. For the latest Yellow Fever Policy please click here

9. Confirmed flight ticket.

10. Hotel voucher (verifiable) stating the name and duration of visit, physical address, as well as contact details of the hotel as well as authorized signature’s name, designation, and signature.

11. Marriage certificate with Notary, where applicable (For verification purpose applicant needs to carry the Original Marriage Certificate at the time of submission at VFS centre)

Minor Applicants:

- NOC from School/University

- Copy of Birth Certificate

- Sponsorship Letter & expenses, Parent’s Marriage Certificate

- Parental Authorization (If Minor is travelling alone)


Points to note:

Any applicant may be asked to provide additional documents as per Embassy’s discretion. Processing days will be calculated once all documents have been submitted in accordance with embassy requirements.

                Description: Japan Visa Required for Indian Nationals residing in UAE.

Jurisdiction:

UAE nationals and other nationals with residential status in the emirates of Dubai, Sharjah, Ajman, Umm Al Quwain, Ras Al Khaimah and Fujairah.

UAE Residents (including its citizen and foreigner) of Afghanistan, Syria, and Yemen.
                Visa Fees: AED 105

                Type: Tourist
                Documents Required: 1. Original valid passport* (more than 2 blank pages) and the passport with valid UAE residence visa if applies. 

2. Copy of valid passport.

3. Copy of valid UAE residence visa and Emirates ID.

4. photo- Recent photo taken within 6 months with white background is required. ● Glue your photo on your application form.

5. Copy of Information of flight booking.

6. Original certificate of employment of applicant.


   ● ORIGINAL company seal and signature by person in charge are required (including signer's name and position). 

   ● The position and monthly salary of applicant have to be stated. Form is free style. 

   ● It must be address to Consul- General of Japan in Dubai, Form is free style. 

   ● Electronically generated certificate must have ORIGINAL either company seal OR signature by person in charge.

 Please note that the certificate must contain the wording "Electronically generated"

   ● For Partner or Owner, Company letter is required.


 7. Bank statement of applicant (last 3 months, Online statement is acceptable)

 8. Itinerary in Japan form.

 
Please note:

 
* The required documents shall be valid at the time of visa application and shall be submitted within 3 months from the date of issue. 

* The applicant may be requested to submit additional documents that are deemed necessary for the examination. 

* The applicant who has multiple valid passports, Japan visa will be sticked on the passport with valid UAE residence visa.

 Once all the documents are ready, appointment has to be booked by directly emailing the Consulate.

Name: Albania Short Stay Tourist Visa
                Visiting Country: Albania
                Description: Albania visitor visa is required for Indian passport holders. This visa allows people to visit Albania for tourism and visiting friend or family.
Albania visa is not required for Indian passport holders who holds:
1). A valid, multiple-entry Schengen visa, which has been previously used in one of the Schengen states, or a valid resident permit of stay in one of the Schengen states. 
2). A valid, multiple-entry US or UK visa, which has been previously used in the respective country of issuance, or a valid permit of stay in the US or UK.

                Visa Fees: Not Available

                Visa Needed: 1
                Type: Tourist
                Documents Required: Documents Requirements

1). Visa application form, completed by the applicant, which is available online free of charge (the application form is completed online during the application, is generated and downloaded by the system)
2). Proof of employment from their country of birth or country of residence. In case of this criteria not being met, the foreign citizen has to provide sufficient evidence that they will return to their country of birth or country of residence.
3). Photograph of the applicant, with dimensions 47 mm x 36 mm
4). Photocopy of the valid travel document
5). Statement according to the legal provisions, where the consent of the parent or legal guardian is expressed according to the legislation in force for the travel of the minor.
6). Documents showing a booking in an accommodation facility, according to the legislation on tourism or invitation from the person, natural or legal, where they will be accommodated
7). Documents showing that the applicant has sufficient financial means for living, both for the duration of the stay and for returning to a third country, in which he is safe to enter or which is able to enjoy such financial and legal means in the Republic of Albania, in accordance with the provisions of this decision
8). Round-trip ticket reservation document, or to certify the possibility of personal transport.
9). Residence permit more than 12 months, issued from the country of residence, with a validity period of at least 3 addition months than the duration period of the required visa.

Name: Argentina Tourist Visa
                Visiting Country: Argentina
                Description: Argentina Tourist visa is required for Indian passport holders. This visa allows people to visit Argentina for tourism or sightseeing. Visa processing time is approximately 7 working days.

Embassy of the Republic of Argentina, New Delhi accept application if your place of residence is in Bangladesh, Bhutan, India (except Maharashtra), Maldives, Nepal or Sri Lanka.

Consulate of the Republic of Argentina, Mumbai only accept Maharashtra and Karnataka passport for Visa.

                Visa Fees: Gratis

                Visa Needed: 1
                Type: Tourist
                Documents Required: Documents Requirements

1). Original Passport: must be valid for a minimum of six (6). months from the intended date of entry and have at least two (1). . Completely free pages left, for the Consular visa stamp and Argentina's Migration entry & exit stamps. Photo copy of passport (1st and last page, valid or recently expired Visas). must be presented at the time of submission.
2). Visa application form: Must be a 3-page Visa form (cannot be back-to-back). All questions must be answered and the form must be signed by the applicant. Incomplete or incorrect forms shall not be accepted.
3). Photo: Two (1)recent passport style, color photograph (4 x 4 cm). White background. Front Face.
4). Cover letter by the applicant, addressed to the Visa Section of the Embassy of Argentina in Delhi, must be duly notarized and should include the following: purpose of visit, duration of stay in Argentina, passport details of the applicant, passport details of those accompanying the applicant, who will bear all the expenses for the trip. The mentioned note should be non-officially translated into Spanish.
[Please note that entrepreneurs must provide the cover letter on the letterhead of their company]
5). A letter from your employer confirming that you are currently employed at the company and for how long (in case you are on leave, it should also be stated in the letter). This letter must be written on company letter-head, signed by the person in charge, notarized and duly translated to Spanish by a professional translator (the translation does not need to be notarized). It should also be accompanied by the last 3 months' salary/pay-slip and last 3 year's Income Tax Return -ITR-.
If you are the owner of the business, please add a copy of your business's official registration and last 3 year's Income Tax Return -ITR-.
If you are self-employed or a student, you need to present all documents/certificates related to your current occupation. All such documents must be notarized and duly translated into Spanish by a professional translator (the translation does not need to be notarized).
6). Travel itinerary (corresponding to the tickets provided)7). Round trip flight tickets (Only reservations)
[Please note that internal flight or bus tickets and/or cruise booking must also be included, if applicable]
8). Hotel reservations corresponding to flight tickets and itinerary (Must be reservations)
In case a hotel reservation is not made and if there is an invitation from a person in Argentina, an ORIGINAL invitation letter is required. The letter must be certified by an Argentine Public Notary and also by the "Colegio de Escribanos" (the Public Notaries Association). Along with the original letter of invitation submit a copy of the Argentine ID Card from the person inviting (DNI). The invitation letter can follow the general guidelines of the model letter available in the website of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, International Trade and Worship of Argentina.
Link: https://www.cancilleria.gob.ar/es/servicios/visas/visa-para-turismo

Invitation letter in Spanish can also be issued digitally through a system called 'TrÃƒÂ¡mites a Distancia - TAD'. In that case. Please forward the following link to the concerned person in Argentina to understand the process of TAD.

https://tramitesadistancia.gob.ar/static/TAD%20-%20C%C3%B3mo%20iniciar%1). . ...

9). Applicant's salary slips (3 months, latest) [If not applicable for self, please add trip sponsor's]
10). Applicant's personal, consolidated bank statements duly stamped by the bank (Last 6 months)
[For dependents, please add a copy of the trip sponsor's bank statements]
11). Copy of passport & valid/latest visas (if any)

Personal Interview: All visa applicants without exception need to have a personal interview with a consular officer. Dates for the personal interview is shall be confirmed on completion of the verification process.

Please note that it is advisable to apply 4 weeks in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

In accordance with the relevant Law of the Argentine Republic and the international practice, the Consul is entitled to refuse the visa and request for more documents apart from the above-mentioned list.

Important: under bilateral agreement, tourist visas for Indian nationals are free. For other countries, they must pay the corresponding fees.

For MINORS: They require an authorization from who exercises parental rights. In case both parents exercise the mentioned rights, the two (both) parents should accompany them at the time of the personal interview. (The visa form of a minor must be signed by all who exercise parental rights).

bank statements
building society book

In case of death of both parents the procedure has to be carried out by legal guardian at Mumbai Consulate and death certificates mandatory of both parents to be produced. Name: Colombia Visitor Tourist Visa
                Visiting Country: Colombia
                Description: Columbia Tourist visa is required for Indian passport holders. This visa allows people to visit Columbia for tourism, sightseeing or visiting family/friend.

                Visa Fees: USD 52

                Visa Needed: 1
                Type: Tourist
                Documents Required: 1. Copy of passport data page or valid travel document with the personal details of the visa holder with blank pages to stamp the visa on.

2. Copy of the last entry and exit stamp or salvoconducto, where appropriate, or copy of the document that demonstrates regularized migration status in the country of residence if different from nationality.

3. Copy of the last Colombian visa. If given with OCR this requirement is not necessary.

4. Duly notarized power of attorney if visa procedure is going to be finalized by an appointed representative.

5. If the visa application is sponsored by the applicant or another person: 1. Letter signed by the applicant or by the person that's sponsoring the application which must include: Complete identification of the applicant or of the sponsor (as evidenced in the passport or ID document), explanation of the ties with the foreigner, motivation of the trip and declaration of economic responsibility for the living and travel expenses of the foreigner. 2. Bank statements of the applicant or the sponsor of the last six (6) months prior to the lodging of the visa application.

6. If the visa application is sponsored by one or various entities: 1. Letter signed by the legal representative of the institution or company stating: - Name of the institution or company, NIT (if legally constituted in Colombia) and contact details. - Identification of the foreigner as evidenced in passport. - Activity, duration and agenda of the foreigner while in Colombia. - Explanation of ties with the foreigner and qualifications or expertise. - Declaration of economic responsibility for the living and travel expenses of the foreigner. 2. If the application is sponsored by an private institution or company legally constituted in another country the foreigner must include a certificate of existence and legal representation, or equivalent document, duly apostilled or legalized as per situation. If it is in a language different to Spanish, it must be translated and legalized. 3. Demonstrate financial solvency with the presentation of bank statements of the last 6 months, prior to the lodging of the visa application, belonging to the sponsoring entity or company. Public entities do not have to fulfill this requirement.

7. Additional Documents as required

8. Digital Photograph

Name: Estonia Short Stay Tourist Visa
                Visiting Country: Estonia
                Description: Estonia tourist visa is required for Indian passport holders.


Visa is a permit to enter Estonia for a short stay visit not exceeding 90 days in any 180-day period as a tourist. All visa applicants must submit applications in person to Estonian representations. You have to book an appointment for submission, which should be requested online through the system eelviisataotlus.vm.ee. After completing the online application, the form must be printed out and signed before submitting it, together with other required documents to an Estonian representation for processing. Only a signed application is valid for applying for a visa.

A visa application should be submitted at least 15 calendar days before the intended visit and cannot be lodged earlier than three months before the start of the intended visit.
                Visa Fees: Euros 80/ INR. 7250/- (Adult)
Euros 40/ INR. 3625/- (Child between 6 to 12 Years)
Gratis (Child below 6 Years)
- Along with the visa fees, there is a service charge of INR 1994/- (All VFS service charges are inclusive of Goods & Service Tax SGST @ 9% and CGST@ 9%)
                Visa Needed: 1
                Type: Tourist
                Documents Required: 1. Application form duly filled and signed twice by the applicant.

- For minor, visa application signed twice by legal guardian (Proving the custody of a minor child, apostilled birth certificate, divorce papers etc)

2. Two recent photos in the size of 35X45 mm with white background 80% face.
 
3. Original passport - valid for at least three months with minimum 2 blank pages.
 
- All previous passport and proof of loss passport (if any)
 
- The passport should be issued less than 10 years ago.
 
4. Copies of all previous Schengen visa with stamps if any.

5. Original covering letter signed by applicant with purpose of travel, designation, passport details and date of travel.
 
6. In case of self-employed - Certificate of Incorporation.
 
7. NOC from company.
 
8. Financial documents:
 
- Last 3 months' salary slips.

- Income Tax Acknowledgement for last three years.

- Last six-month bank statements with stamp and signature on it.

9. Travel insurance - medical coverage minimum Euro 30,000.

10. Confirmed hotel voucher and airline return tickets.

11. For sponsor: Proof of sponsorship and a letter from the sponsor, financial documents as well as copy of the sponsor’s photo ID, (e.g. passport, Aadhaar card or driver’s license)

12. In case of retired - Pension statements for last 3 months or proof of regular income generated by ownership of property or business.

- Sponsorship Letter & expenses, Parent’s Marriage Certificate

visa_info:
Name: UK Standard Tourist Visitor Visa - 10 Years
                Visiting Country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
                Description: Applicants needs to fill online application form and Pay the fees online
United Kingdom Tourist visa is required for Indian passport holders. This visa allows people to visit United Kingdom for a holiday or recreation, visit family and/or friends and for other short-term non-work purpose.

Visa duration is granted by British Embassy from 6 months to 10 years depending upon the requirement.

Applications should be processed at any British Diplomatic Visa issuing post in the applicant's normal country of residence. Application should be applied online through the website: www.visa4uk.fco.gov.uk.

Child below 5 years old are Exempted from Biometrics
                Visa Fees: INR-105372
                Visa Needed: 1
                Type: Tourist
                Documents Required: 1. Original passport - valid for at least three months with minimum 2 blank pages.

- All previous passport and proof of loss passport (if any)

- The passport should be issued less than 10 years ago.

2. Online application form.

3. All previous visa copies (If any)

4. Covering letter in original signed by the applicant. For self-employed/business, letter will be on company's letterhead.

6. NOC/Leave letter on company letterhead.

7. Financial documents:

- Last 3 months' salary slips.

- Income Tax Acknowledgement for last three years.

- Last six-month bank statements with stamp and signature on it.

In case of Minor:

- A parent/legal guardian shall submit birth certificate, if the parents are the legal guardians, or the decision of the competent authority on appointing the legal guardian.

- A minor accompanied by one parent/ legal guardian or alone shall provide original notarized consent of the legal guardian that shall contain personal information, the period and length of stay in Bulgaria, the period for which the consent is issued, and the signature of the other parent/legal guardian, plus copies of another parent’s guardian’s passport or ID.


Points to note:

The UK embassy will create the updated checklist when payment confirmation is received in order to schedule the submission appointment.

Any applicant may be asked to provide additional documents as per Embassy’s discretion.

Processing days will be calculated once all documents have been submitted in accordance with embassy requirements.

Priority /Super priority options as per availability at the time of taking appointment with the additional charges by embassy.

Two recent passport size photographs required for Child below 5 years (for adult photos will be taken once application submitted at the time of biometrics).

                Visiting Country: Liechtenstein
                Description: Liechtenstein tourist visa is required for Indian passport holders. Visa formalities and issuance are handled by Embassy of Switzerland in India.
This visa allows people to visit Liechtenstein for tourism or sightseeing. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days.
Visa processing time is approximately 15 working days.

Embassy of Switzerland in India
The Swiss embassy represents Switzerland's interests in the country and provides consular services and visa support for people resident in: Uttar Pradesh, Punjab, Orissa, Bihar, Arunachal Pradesh, West Bengal, Sikkim, Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram, Assam, Tripura, Jammu & Kashmir (UT), Ladakh (UT) , Haryana, Delhi, Uttarakhand, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh, Chandigarh (UT), Lakshadweep (UT), Jharkhand, Meghalaya, Kingdom of Bhutan

Consulate General of Switzerland in Mumbai
The Consulate General in Mumbai provides consular services for people resident in: Andhra Pradesh, Chhattisgarh, Goa, Gujarat, Karnataka, Kerala, Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, as well as Andaman & Nicobar, Daman & Diu, Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Puducherry. The Consulate General in Mumbai does not offer any visa services. We therefore ask all our Indian guests and travelers wishing to visit the popular tourist destinations in Switzerland, to contact the Embassy of Switzerland in New Delhi for visa support.

Consulate General of Switzerland in Bengaluru
The Consulate General in Bengaluru does not offer any visa/consular services. We therefore ask all our Indian guests and travelers wishing to visit the popular tourist destinations in Switzerland, to contact the Embassy of Switzerland in New Delhi for visa support. For all consular affairs for persons resident in: Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka, Kerala, Tamil Nadu as well as Puducherry and Andaman & Nicobar, please contact the Consulate General in Mumbai.

                Visa Fees: Euro 80/ INR. 7,200/- (Adult)
Euro 40/ INR. 3,600/ (Child between 6 to 12 Years)
Gratis - Child below 6 Years
Applicants shall be levied a Service Charge of INR 2070/- and a Convenience Fees of INR 150/- payable for provision of multiple mode of payment.

                Visa Needed: 1
                Type: Tourist
                Documents Required: 1. Valid national passport issued within the last 10 years and with at least 3 months validity after the scheduled return; with at least two blank pages. Handwritten passports and passports with observations regarding the front page (bio data) cannot be accepted. Passport should be valid for 3 months from the date of exit from Schengen region.
2. 2 passport size pictures, not older than 6 months (size 35 x 40 mm in width, no copy or scanned picture): 1st picture pasted on the application, 2nd picture to be clipped face down on top right hand corner of the form, stapled or pinned pictures cannot be accepted.

3. Visa application completed, signed twice by the applicant & if applicable: Authorization (for 3rd person). In case applicant is a minor: Visa application signed twice by legal guardian & if applicable: Authorization (for third person).

4. Previous passport/s if any (recommendation: bound together by rubber band, not stapled).

5. Personal covering letter (Original) with the travel plan (if the applicant is submitting the applications of his / her family, then all applications must include a copy of the covering letter)

6. Introduction letter on the business letterhead from the employer / company (Original, signed & stamped by HR or Directorate) mentioning your position, duration of your service and no objection statement regarding the planned trip to Switzerland/Schengen countries, the dates and purpose of the trip.

7. Travel Insurance (kindly refer to the approved list of Indian Travel insurances. The insurance has to cover the entire stay in Schengen territory. Applicants who wish to apply for a six months or one year multiple entry visa are not obliged to provide a 180 (365) day coverage. It will be sufficient to submit an insurance policy covering the first journey.

8. Flight reservation and if applicable proof of intra-Schengen flight, train itinerary or car rental.

9. Proof of accommodation in Switzerland / Schengen countries for your entire stay (e.g. confirmation of hotel reservation, package tour, advanced payments etc.).

10. Proof of financial status (all documents have to be Originals, in format A4, with stamp/signature of Bank):

11. If Employed: Last 3 month's salary slips and last 3 month's salary bank account statements, Last 3 month's personal bank account statements, Personal Indian Income Tax Return for the last 2 assessment years.

12. If Self-Employed and/or company owner: Business registration certificate / Partnership Deed / Proof of proprietorship, or other proof of ownership, Last 3 month's personal & business bank account statements, Company's Indian Income Tax Return for the last 2 assessment years
 
13. If Retired: Pension statements for the last 3 months, Proof of regular income generated by ownership of property or business.
 
14. If Student or Unemployed: Parents or legal guardians must provide their personal bank account statements for the past 3 months, personal income tax returns for last 2 years along with a confirmation letter of financial support and a copy of their passports.

15. Visas for UK or USA to be obtained first if applicant visits these countries before Schengen.

16. Students above 16 years of age: copy of Student college ID card & Introduction letter of School/College/University etc. 

17. Children travelling not with both parents (under 18 years of age): written consent letter certified by public notary of the other, non-travelling parent or legal guardian.

18.Children travelling alone (under 18 years of age): written consent letter certified by public notary of both parents or legal guardian.

19. In all cases: copies of the passports of both parents (legal guardian/s) or PAN cards or driving licenses.

20. Clear photocopies of the 1st and last page of the passport (bio data)

5. Photocopy of the data and amendment pages of the applicant's passport.

The Embassy in New Delhi will process those who reside/work in northern India including Jammu and Kashmir, Punjab, Haryana, Uttar Pradesh, Himachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand, and Rajasthan; all the rest will be handled by the respective Honorary Consulates.

                Visa Fees: Rs.3,160.00

                Visa Needed: 1
                Type: Tourist
                Documents Required: 1. Visa application form fully and legibly completed in English by the applicant

2. One passport size photograph taken no more than 6 months ago. Scanned photos are not acceptable.

3. Bank statements for the last six months stamped and signed by bank officer

4. Original passport valid for at least 6 months beyond the contemplated stay in the Philippines.

5. Photocopy of the data and amendment pages of the applicant's passport.

6. Copy of e-ticket showing CONFIRMED flight details; For temporary visitor's visa and transit visa holders: Your return or onward journey plane ticket must be presented to the Philippine immigration officer upon entry into the Philippines.

7. Copy of Credit cards and/or travelers checks or foreign exchange endorsement of the passport

8. Original, signed letter from inviting party (if applicable) indicating complete address and telephone number. The letter must also be notarized in the Philippines.

9. If employed, applicant's Certificate of Current Employment from Employer to include employer's full name, address and telephone number, applicant's length of service and salary details

This affidavit must be presented before immigration officials at the port of entry in the Philippines upon the minor's arrival in the Philippines.

13. If Spouse of a Philippine Citizen: Name of Filipino spouse should be indicated in the visa applicant's passport Copy of Report of Marriage issued by the Philippine Embassy or Philippine National Statistics office

14. If Unmarried Minor Child of a Filipino Parent: Copy of Birth Certificate and Copy of Parent's valid passports

1.) Either a valid (used or unused) American (US), Japanese, Australian, Canadian, Schengen, United Kingdom, or Singaporean multiple-entry visa or permanent residence permit.
2.) An Indian passport valid at least six (6) months beyond the date of departure from the Philippines;
3.) Return or onward ticket to the next country of destination; and
4.) No derogatory record with the Philippine Bureau of Immigration.

 Processing fee in demand draft drawn from any bank in India with branch in New Delhi payable to "Embassy of the Philippines". Cash payments will not be accepted.
For payment details, please refer to Schedule of Fees
Note: Depending on the initial evaluation of the visa processors, other documents may be required. Applicants are advised to submit their documents at least two weeks before scheduled departure for the Philippines.

8. Last 3 months’ personal bank statement (original or copies attested by bank)

9. In case elf employee -Company registration documents. Original notary and Mantralaya/MEA attestation needs to be done for each applicant.

10. Hotel reservation with contact number and full address.
 
11. Confirmed round trip flight ticket.
 
12. Minors need consent letter from both parents in all cases (even though minor is travelling with both parents). The consent NOC must be on stamp paper with photos of parents and applicant and notarized.

13. If married, Marriage Certificate of the Couple issued by the marriage registrar /Affidavit required attested by Notary Public

14. Travel Insurance is mandatory requirement which should fulfil requirements. (Medical Evacuation and repatriation expenses/Personal accidental death/Personal liability/Daily allowance in hospitalization cases)

- This plan should cover the insured for a minimum of Euro 30000. The travel insurance should cover the duration of stay in Türkiye and must be valid minimum for 3 months.


Note:  As per the visa regime between India and Türkiye, single entry business visa issues for maximum 30 days duration of stay in Türkiye. Multiple entry business visa is an exceptional visa, which may be issued rarely by the decision of the visa officer only for high level officials of big companies, doing business with Turkish companies.
